testcase.name: provides initial auth state with loading true
provides user as null when not signed in
sets loading to false after initialization
loads auth state from AsyncStorage on mount
handles empty auth state from AsyncStorage
handles invalid auth state from AsyncStorage
signs in with valid email and password

has proper accessibility labels on inputs

renders register link when onNavigateToRegister is provided
calls onNavigateToRegister when register link is pressed

displays generic error for invalid credentials
has proper touch target for sign in button
